'''CZ-12-R''' was the old [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] that belonged to [[Cal Omas]] during his [[Time/Legends|time]] as a [[Senator/Legends|senator]].

*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{1st}}
